allow:
Bash("/c/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -padmin validation_system <<'EOF'
-- Update admin role from ROLE_ADMIN to ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN
UPDATE user_roles SET role_id = 1 WHERE user_id = \(SELECT id FROM users WHERE username = 'admin'\) AND role_id = 7;

-- Verify
SELECT u.id, u.username, r.name FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.user_id 
LEFT JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id 
WHERE u.username='admin';
EOF)
